data.title: Ethereum L2 MegaETH hits 47K TPS in global stress test, aiming for 11B transactions during mainnet opening for apps.
data.description: MegaETH is set to launch its mainnet, allowing for the testing of latency-sensitive applications. The mainnet will aim to handle a significant load, with a target of processing 11 billion transactions within a week. This move is crucial to evaluate the platform's performance under high stress conditions and ensure its readiness for real-world use.

data.title: Correction: 6Letters launches "MOJO KING" app for non-invasive testosterone monitoring on Apple Watch with USD 5 million investment.
data.description: 6Letters has introduced a new iOS app called "MOJO KING" for monitoring testosterone levels with Apple Watch technology. The announcement was made on January 19, 2026. In a news release from 6Letters via PR Newswire, it was clarified that the company has invested USD 5 million into the development of this innovative non-invasive monitoring solution.

data.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum weakened amid geopolitical tensions, while XRP and Dogecoin gained. Bitcoin at $92,635.81, Ethereum at $3,182.04, XRP at $1.97, Solana at $133.58, and Dogecoin at $0.1283. Bitcoin consolidating between $92,000-$93,300, trading volume up 10% in last 24 hours. $100 million liquidated in derivatives market in last 24 hours. Bitcoin's open interest rose by 0.73%. "Fear" sentiment prevails according to Crypto Fear & Greed Index.
data.description: Leading cryptocurrencies experienced a lackluster performance on Monday due to geopolitical tensions over Greenland. Bitcoin saw a minimal decrease of -0.12% to $92,635.81, while Ethereum dropped by -1.06% to $3,182.04. XRP increased by +1.33% to $1.97, Solana fell by -0.38% to $133.58, and Dogecoin rose by +1.01% to $0.1283. Bitcoin consolidated between $92,000 to $93,300 with a 10% rise in trading volume. Ethereum hit a low of $3,166 after trading sideways. Over $100 million was liquidated from the derivatives market in the last 24 hours. Bitcoin's open interest increased by 0.73% and the percentage of Binance traders with long BTC positions rose to 67%. The Crypto Fear & Greed Index reflected a prevailing "Fear" sentiment in the market.

data.title: Xthings Inc. launched Ulticam IQ V2 with Edge AI and Gemini Cloud Intelligence on Nov 20. Free Cloud Storage included.
data.description: Xthings Inc. has introduced the Ulticam IQ V2, equipped with Edge AI and Gemini Cloud Intelligence, ready for Matter 1.5. The new product also offers free cloud storage. The announcement was made on 20-Nov-2025 by Ulticam and Xthings Inc. The device includes updated features and benefits for users, ensuring a seamless experience.
